title: T-029 — Cycle-count quick-adjustment service (P1 stub) (WH §8.8)
prompt:
# T-029 — Cycle-count quick-adjustment service (P1 stub) (WH §8.8)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §8.8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the P1 stub: thin wrapper around T-028 adjustment with a 'cycle-count' reason_code tag + audit context. Full cycle-count workflow (WH-E14) deferred to P2.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/cycle-count-quick.ts`: function `cycleCountQuickAdjust({lp_id, actual_qty, reason_code, reason_text})` delegating to `adjustLpQuantity` with `context_jsonb.source='cycle_count_p1_stub'`.
2. Same threshold gate (§8.5) applies (V-WH-MOV-007).
3. Records audit-visible `lp_genealogy.operation_type='adjustment'` with `context_jsonb.cycle_count=true`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/cycle-count-quick-adj.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/cycle-count-quick-adj.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a P1 cycle count quick adjustment of LP 100→105 (5%), when invoked, then it routes through adjustment service and an lp_genealogy row with context_jsonb.cycle_count=true exists.
2. Given delta=20%, when invoked, then it routes to movement_approvals (V-WH-MOV-007).
3. Given the call succeeds, when stock_moves row is inspected, then reason_code is preserved and context tag is present.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/cycle-count-quick.test.ts` asserting context tagging + threshold delegation.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test cycle-count-quick`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not build the full cycle-count workflow (P2 WH-E14).
- Do not bypass the §8.5 threshold gate.

## Dependencies
- T-028
